profile.name: Reski
profile.heroHeadline: My name is Reski, nice to meet you!
profile.featuredIntro: A selection of projects where bold ideas meet thoughtful design. From visual identities and digital experiences to creative brand communication, each work is crafted to leave a lasting impact.
profile.aboutBio: I'm a Social Media Specialist who enjoys transforming creative ideas into engaging and meaningful digital content. I love exploring trends, creating compelling visuals, and developing content strategies that help brands connect with their audiences. Beyond creating content, I enjoy collaborating, learning new things, and bringing positive energy into every project.
profile.storyText: Somehow, one idea turned into a post, one post became a campaign, and now here I am — planning content, editing videos, writing captions, and checking social media insights professionally.
profile.toolsIntro: The tools I use most often to transform ideas into engaging content, manage digital campaigns, and build meaningful connections between brands and their audiences.

services.title: Social Media Management
services.summary: Planning, scheduling, and growing brand accounts with strategy and consistency.
services.detail: Managing end-to-end social media presence — from content planning to community engagement. Includes the Diniyyah Al Azhar portfolio and live streaming hosting.

services.title: Content Design
services.summary: Designing scroll-stopping content built to earn reach and engagement.
services.detail: A gallery of content design work for HaloJob and Graha, featuring the top-performing pieces with the highest engagement.

services.title: Brand Visual
services.summary: Building cohesive brand identities across print and digital touchpoints.
services.detail: Brochures, booth design, company guide books, and company profile voice-overs — crafting a consistent brand look and feel.

services.title: Copy Writing
services.summary: Words that carry the message and move the audience.
services.detail: Article and long-form writing that communicates ideas clearly and persuasively.

services.title: Photography
services.summary: Capturing moments and products with a clean, story-driven eye.
services.detail: Photography for content, products, and events — composing frames that feel natural, on-brand, and ready to publish across social platforms.

projects.title: Diniyyah Al Azhar — Social Media
projects.description: Full social media management for Diniyyah Al Azhar — content planning, publishing, and engagement to grow the institution's digital presence.

projects.title: Live Streaming Host
projects.description: Hosting live streaming sessions — engaging audiences in real time and driving interaction across platforms.

projects.title: HaloJob — Content Gallery
projects.description: A gallery of content design pieces for HaloJob, highlighting the top 3 posts with the highest engagement.

projects.title: Graha — Content Gallery
projects.description: Content design gallery for Graha, showcasing best-performing pieces with strong engagement.

projects.title: Brand Visual Kit
projects.description: Brand visual work: brochures, booth design, a company guide book, and company profile voice-over.

projects.title: Article Writing
projects.description: Written articles crafted to inform and engage the target audience.

tools.name: Adobe Photoshop
tools.description: Creating and refining social media visuals, promotional materials, and digital content with strong, consistent, and engaging visual communication.

tools.name: CapCut
tools.description: Producing dynamic short-form videos by combining footage, audio, text, effects, and transitions for Reels, TikTok, and other digital platforms.

tools.name: Meta Business Suite
tools.description: Planning and scheduling content, managing Facebook and Instagram accounts, monitoring audience engagement, and analyzing content performance.

videos.description: A short-form video piece produced end-to-end.

videos.description: Another highlight from my video content work.
